description: Allowlist for @reigh/editor-sdk public re-exports that originate from internal paths outside src/sdk/, plus inlineDeclarations for SDK-inline exports that remain at the boundary pending extraction milestones.

inlineDeclarations.rationale: Family bridge: maps contribution kinds to their milestone identifiers. Thin wrapper around family registry data; will be cleaned up when families are extracted.
Family bridge: checks whether a contribution kind has not been bridged. Thin wrapper; cleanup deferred to family extraction.
Family bridge: retrieves family definition for video editor families. Thin wrapper; cleanup deferred to family extraction.
Family bridge: retrieves family conformance report. Thin wrapper; cleanup deferred to family extraction.
Family bridge: retrieves legacy bridge status for video families. Thin wrapper; cleanup deferred to family extraction.
M4 exception: Host shell DOM wiring function. Deeply coupled to host shell mount/unmount lifecycle. Extraction requires M4 host-adapter refactoring.
M4 exception: Host shell DOM wiring function. Deeply coupled to host shell mount/unmount lifecycle. Extraction requires M4 host-adapter refactoring.

M4 exception: ~400-line factory deeply coupled to host wiring, provider services, storage, console behavior, timeline contexts, and React lifecycle. Extracting it would pull host-adapter refactoring into this milestone.

M7: Manifest contribution interface for effect declarations. M2a core type blocked from extraction by circular dependency on M2b contribution type aliases still inline in index.ts. Will move to src/sdk/manifest.ts in M2b.

M8: Manifest contribution interface for transition declarations. M2a core type blocked from extraction by circular dependency on M2b contribution type aliases still inline in index.ts. Will move to src/sdk/manifest.ts in M2b.

M9: Manifest contribution interface for clip type declarations. M2a core type blocked from extraction by circular dependency on M2b contribution type aliases still inline in index.ts. Will move to src/sdk/manifest.ts in M2b.

M6: Extension permission declaration interface. M2a core type blocked from extraction by circular dependency on M2b contribution type aliases still inline in index.ts. Will move to src/sdk/manifest.ts in M2b.

M2a core packaging type: describes an installed extension package. Depends on ExtensionManifest which is blocked from extraction by circular deps on M2b contribution type aliases. Will move to src/sdk/packaging.ts in M2b.

M2a core validation function: validates an extension manifest against schema and contribution contracts. Uses ExtensionManifest and all contribution type aliases inline. Will move to src/sdk/manifest.ts (or manifestValidation.ts) in M2b when contribution types are extracted.
M2a core validation function: validates an installed extension package. Depends on InstalledExtensionPackage and ExtensionManifest which are blocked. Will move to src/sdk/packaging.ts in M2b.

M2a core manifest type: the top-level extension manifest interface. Depends on ~18 contribution type aliases (EffectContribution, TransitionContribution, etc.) that are still inline in index.ts. Will move to src/sdk/manifest.ts in M2b once contribution types have canonical modules.
M2a core packaging type: describes project-level extension requirements. Depends on ExtensionId, ContributionId and installed package types. Will move to src/sdk/packaging.ts in M2b.
M2a core packaging type: collection of project extension requirements. Depends on ProjectExtensionRequirement. Will move to src/sdk/packaging.ts in M2b.
M3 core timeline mutation contracts. Portable interface describing timeline mutation operations. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/timeline.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal lifecycle state type. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal expiry detail interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: timeline proposal interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal listener callback type. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal runtime service interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: source map runtime interface for mapping generated objects to timeline sources. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: source map entry interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: generated object metadata interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal panel state interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal panel action type. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M3 core proposal contract: proposal envelope interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M1: Proposal import status type for import/export of proposals. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M1: Proposal import diagnostic interface for import validation. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
M1: Proposal import result interface. Awaits extraction to src/sdk/proposals.ts.
